form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 401m at this track behind Brett Keeping beaten 7 lengths (23.41). Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Jumped well on debut from box 1 and went straight to the lead, getting off the mark with a 0.8 lengths win (23.08) over 401m at this track. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.
